Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Prediction: Another medal for Team South Africa TONIGHT?

South Africa could add to its medal tally at the Paris Olympics 2024 in the women’s 800m final on Monday, 5 August.

South Africacould add to its medal tally at theParis Olympics 2024in the women’s800mfinal onMonday, 5 August.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

Prudence Sekgodisowill attempt to emulate compatriotCaster Semenyain winning gold in the race which is scheduled for21:37(SA time).

Semenya won gold in the two-lap race in both 2012 in London and 2016 in Rio de Janeiro.

Sekgodiso, still only 22 years of age, is a rising middle distance star who has enjoyed a breakthrough season in 2024.

It came as no surprise to many to see her cruise through the heats and semi-finals and reach the final.

Leading South African bookmakersBetwayhave installed Sekgodiso as the fourth-favourite for the race.

Great Britain’sKeely Hodgkisonin the overwhelming favourite for gold at9/100, followed by Kenya’sMary Moraa (63/10)andTsige Duguma (12/1)of Ethiopia.

Sekgodiso can be backed at128/5.

Meanwhile, following a jam-packed weekend of action at the Paris Olympics 2024, Team South Africa finds itself in a tie for29thplace in the medal table alongsideKazakhstan.

South Africa have won a gold, a silver and two bronze medals to date.

The gold and silver medals were won byTatjana Smithin the women’s 100m breaststroke and 200m breaststroke, respectively.

The men’srugby sevensteam as well asAlan Hatherlyin the men’s mountain bike cross country won the bronze medals.

title: Prediction: Another medal for Team South Africa TONIGHT?

description: South Africa could add to its medal tally at the Paris Olympics 2024 in the women's 800m final on Monday, 5 August.
